title: commiphora steynii
intro: Commiphora steynii, also known as the African myrrh tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Burseraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Commiphora steynii include wound healing, anti-aging, and immune system support, making it a popular ingredient in skincare products and supplements. Herbal preparations of Commiphora steynii are typically made from its resin, which is extracted and used in creams, ointments, and tinctures to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
